summary.quantification_method: TMT reporter ion signal to noise (S/N) ratios

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison across cell activation, maturation, or differentiation states.
evidence: To systematically profile proteome dynamics during human embryonic stem cell differentiation into oligodendrocytes, we applied in-depth quantitative proteomics at different developmental stages
we studied the global proteome signature of developing OL by conducting a stepwise differentiation process to differentiate the hESC RH6 line into an OL lineage.

attributes.agent: dual SMAD inhibition (SB431542, LDN193189, all trans-retinoic acid)
attributes.dose_or_concentration: 10 µM SB431542, 250 nM LDN193189, 100 nM all trans-retinoic acid
evidence: hESC (d0, Supplementary Fig. S1B) differentiation was initiated by neural induction through dual SMAD inhibition; within 8 days, we observed the presence of SOX1+ NSCs (d8, Supplementary Fig. S1C).

Under the treatment of 10 µM SB431542 (SB, inhibitor of TGF-β/activin/nodal signalling), 250 nM LDN193189 (LDN, inhibitor of bone morphogenetic protein signalling), and 100 nM all trans-retinoic acid (RA, caudalizing patterning agent) for 8 days

attributes.agent: RA and SAG (smoothened agonist of sonic hedgehog)
evidence: Further treatment of NSCs by caudalizing and ventralizing morphogens gave rise to OLIG2+ NPCs on day 12 (d12, Supplementary Fig. S1D)
100 nM RA and 1 µM smoothened agonist of sonic hedgehog (SAG, ventralizing patterning agent) were applied for 22 days.

attributes.agent: growth factor–rich medium (PDGF-AA, HGF, IGF1, NTF3, T3, insulin, biotin, cAMP)
attributes.dose_or_concentration: 10 ng/mL PDGF-AA, 5 ng/mL HGF, 10 ng/mL IGF1, 10 ng/mL NTF3, 60 ng/mL T3, 25 µg/mL insulin, 100ng/mL biotin, 1 µM cAMP
evidence: maturation of pre-oligodendrocyte progenitor cells (pre-OPCs) was promoted via a chemically defined, growth factor–rich medium, and PDGFRA+ OPCs were generated on day 80 (d80, Supplementary Fig. S1F).

10 ng/mL platelet-derived growth factor AA (PDGF-AA), 5 ng/mL hepatocyte growth factor, 10 ng/mL insulin-like growth factor 1 (IGF1), 10 ng/mL neurotrophin 3 (NTF3), 60 ng/mL 3,3,5-triiodo-l-thyronine (T3 [thyroid hormone]), 25 µg/mL insulin, 100ng/mL biotin, and 1 µM cyclic adenosine monophosphate (cAMP), were added to the culture medium for 60 days

attributes.agent: ascorbic acid, T3, insulin, biotin, and cAMP
evidence: On day 80, the growth factors were withdrawn from the culture medium and OPCs were differentiated into MBP+ OLs in the presence of 10 mM 4-(2-hydroxyethyl)-1-piperazineethanesulfonic acid (HEPES) buffer and 20 µg/mL ascorbic acid (supportive for OL differentiation), in addition to T3, insulin, biotin, and cAMP

multiplex_channel_hints: multiplexed tandem mass tag-based proteomics approach

evidence: relative protein expression changes were quantified from the fragmentation of the tags

relative quantitation of proteins was achieved by pairwise comparison of TMT reporter ion signal to noise (S/N) ratios as the ratio S/N of the labels for each of the differentiation time points vs the labels of the internal control (labelled with TMT 126 reagent)
comparative pairwise analysis of differentiation stages demonstrated that abundances of 352 proteins differentially changed between consecutive differentiation time points.

quantification_strategy: TMT reporter ion signal to noise (S/N) ratios

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment explicitly uses TMT (tandem mass tag) labeling with DDA (data-dependent acquisition) on a Q Exactive Orbitrap.
The experiment explicitly uses TMT (tandem mass tag) labeling with DDA (data-dependent acquisition) on a Q Exactive Orbitrap.
